summary.zh: 平衡 / 数值工作台(规划中)。目标是给数值调优做一个可视化闭环:调用 balance:resim 工具对场景跑 N 次重模拟,在 dashboard 上显示胜率与 95% 置信区间,玩家据此手调数值、再跑一轮,直到平衡。当前为 marketplace 占位:工具(tool-balance-resim)已可用,工作台面板实现安排在后续 sprint。
summary.en: Balance & sim workbench (planned). The goal is a visual loop for numeric tuning: call the balance:resim tool to run N resimulations of a scenario, show win-rate and a 95% CI on a dashboard, then let the player tweak stats and re-run until balanced. Currently a marketplace placeholder: the tool (tool-balance-resim) already works; the workbench panel is scheduled for a later sprint.

body.zh:
调 balance:resim 跑 N 次重模拟
dashboard 显示胜率 + 95% CI,闭环手调
body.en:
Drive balance:resim for N resims
Dashboard win-rate + 95% CI; manual-tune loop

body.zh: 工具已可用;工作台面板待后续 sprint
body.en: The tool works; the panel lands in a later sprint
